title: Integrated Internal TEST Proof and Enki Release Candidate
description: Run complete internal adaptive loops, including the publication-shaped downstream-consumer POC through no-effect adapters, prove feedback, chaos, rollback, recovery, reconstruction, and authority isolation, and package the exact Enki release candidate for human decision.
acceptance_criteria: At least two complete adaptive TEST loops pass across different subject classes and consumer patterns

The mandatory publication-shaped POC executes content, visuals, production-shaped configuration, TEST review and approval, package construction, no-effect publication and distribution, TEST receipts, simulated observation, feedback, calibration, rollback, recovery, tamper, replay, and reconstruction
Synthetic, replay, controlled real-human, malformed, irrelevant, duplicate, contradictory, adversarial, unauthorized, mismatched, and zero-response feedback cases pass end to end
TEST execution is technically incapable of causing production publication, transport, model dispatch, audience exposure, or other external effect
Chaos and interruption campaigns recover without duplicate effects, partial authority, context escalation, audience widening, or unexplained state

The release candidate, exact evidence manifests, calibration report, threat model, runbooks, limitations, release notes, rollback package, and human release-decision package are bound to one exact commit

evidence.description: Integrated internal TEST proof and release-candidate implementation.
Exact Enki 0.1.0-rc1 candidate and release evidence package bound to commit cb84fbc8eef6096e8a707e1b922dfa2eddb23e51.
CI validated the candidate package and integrated proof.
Runtime Coverage passed for the final Sprint 13 candidate branch.
Work Control Authority accepted the qualifying completion evidence.
